fixtures.label: Expense with very long note — truncates without breaking layout

input.note: This is a remarkably long note designed to test text overflow behavior in the expense list row. It contains enough characters to comfortably exceed the visible width of the note field in any standard viewport size from mobile to desktop and should be truncated with an ellipsis rather than wrapping or overflowing its container. Additional padding text follows here to ensure sufficient length for the test.
